skills.label: Ecosystems and cycles
skills.description: Practice and review: The Living World: Ecosystems. Topics include Energy flow; Biogeochemical cycles; Trophic relationships.

skills.label: Biodiversity and ecosystem services
skills.description: Practice and review: The Living World: Biodiversity. Topics include Levels of biodiversity; Ecosystem services; Island biogeography and ecological tolerance.

skills.label: Population dynamics
skills.description: Practice and review: Populations. Topics include Generalist vs specialist; Survivorship and growth models; Human population dynamics.

skills.label: Earth systems and resources
skills.description: Practice and review: Earth Systems and Resources. Topics include Plate tectonics and soil; Atmosphere and climate basics; Watersheds and solar intensity.

skills.label: Land and water use
skills.description: Practice and review: Land and Water Use. Topics include Agriculture and forestry; Mining and urbanization; Fisheries and water resources.

skills.label: Energy resources
skills.description: Practice and review: Energy Resources and Consumption. Topics include Fossil fuels; Nuclear energy; Renewables.

skills.label: Atmospheric pollution
skills.description: Practice and review: Atmospheric Pollution. Topics include Air pollutants; Photochemical smog and acid deposition; Noise and indoor air.

skills.label: Aquatic/terrestrial pollution
skills.description: Practice and review: Aquatic and Terrestrial Pollution. Topics include Sources and effects of pollution; Bioaccumulation; Waste disposal and remediation.

skills.label: Global change
skills.description: Practice and review: Global Change. Topics include Ozone depletion; Climate change causes and effects; Invasive species.
